## Meeting Purpose

[To discuss Marcel Santilli's potential appearance on the Revenue Engine Podcast and explore his insights on content strategy, AI, and marketing leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/uyy1t1h1CkWCjiagHBvdcUnNGyQuchVa?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel emphasizes a people-first approach to content strategy, focusing on deeply understanding the audience and their needs](https://fathom.video/share/uyy1t1h1CkWCjiagHBvdcUnNGyQuchVa?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Two major trends in B2B marketing: founders hesitant to hire CMOs, and confusion around becoming "AI native"](https://fathom.video/share/uyy1t1h1CkWCjiagHBvdcUnNGyQuchVa?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Marcel's unique perspective comes from closing 200+ deals with VPs of marketing, CMOs, and founders in the last year](https://fathom.video/share/uyy1t1h1CkWCjiagHBvdcUnNGyQuchVa?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [The podcast interview is scheduled for July 24th at 9am Pacific/12pm Eastern](https://fathom.video/share/uyy1t1h1CkWCjiagHBvdcUnNGyQuchVa?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Content Strategy Philosophy

  - [Prioritizes understanding the audience deeply: their pain points, frustrations, fears, expectations, and questions](https://fathom.video/share/uyy1t1h1CkWCjiagHBvdcUnNGyQuchVa?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Focuses on being the most useful resource for the target audience consistently](https://fathom.video/share/uyy1t1h1CkWCjiagHBvdcUnNGyQuchVa?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [Believes in giving away knowledge generously to build trust and relationships](https://fathom.video/share/uyy1t1h1CkWCjiagHBvdcUnNGyQuchVa?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Has never prioritized hiring SEO specialists, instead focusing on creating valuable content first](https://fathom.video/share/uyy1t1h1CkWCjiagHBvdcUnNGyQuchVa?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Successfully implemented this approach at IBM, Scale.ai, ServiceNow, and HashiCorp](https://fathom.video/share/uyy1t1h1CkWCjiagHBvdcUnNGyQuchVa?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)

### Impact of AI on SEO and Content Strategy

  - [Companies are losing click-throughs due to AI-generated answers in search results](https://fathom.video/share/uyy1t1h1CkWCjiagHBvdcUnNGyQuchVa?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
  - [Recommends creating more "surface area" with personalized, long-tail content](https://fathom.video/share/uyy1t1h1CkWCjiagHBvdcUnNGyQuchVa?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [Emphasizes the need to convert audience into subscribers to "own your destiny"](https://fathom.video/share/uyy1t1h1CkWCjiagHBvdcUnNGyQuchVa?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [Suggests approaching websites and content more like products](https://fathom.video/share/uyy1t1h1CkWCjiagHBvdcUnNGyQuchVa?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Believes major web players (Google, OpenAI) have no incentive to remove the need for websites](https://fathom.video/share/uyy1t1h1CkWCjiagHBvdcUnNGyQuchVa?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Current B2B Marketing Trends

  - [Founders are increasingly hesitant to hire CMOs or are firing existing ones](https://fathom.video/share/uyy1t1h1CkWCjiagHBvdcUnNGyQuchVa?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [CMOs are struggling to understand and implement "AI native" strategies](https://fathom.video/share/uyy1t1h1CkWCjiagHBvdcUnNGyQuchVa?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [There's a significant education gap around AI implementation in marketing](https://fathom.video/share/uyy1t1h1CkWCjiagHBvdcUnNGyQuchVa?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)

### Marcel's Background and Experience

  - [Started career at IBM, where he launched SecuredIntelligence.com](https://fathom.video/share/uyy1t1h1CkWCjiagHBvdcUnNGyQuchVa?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Has consistently focused on turning brands into publishers and leaders into creators](https://fathom.video/share/uyy1t1h1CkWCjiagHBvdcUnNGyQuchVa?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Launched successful content initiatives and conferences at various companies](https://fathom.video/share/uyy1t1h1CkWCjiagHBvdcUnNGyQuchVa?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Now closes all deals for his current company, providing unique insights from conversations with marketing leaders](https://fathom.video/share/uyy1t1h1CkWCjiagHBvdcUnNGyQuchVa?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)

## Next Steps

  - Marcel to inform team member Dig about the upcoming podcast recording
  - Alex to send a list of 10 topics/questions a week before the interview
  - [Podcast to be recorded on July 24th at 9am Pacific/12pm Eastern](https://fathom.video/share/uyy1t1h1CkWCjiagHBvdcUnNGyQuchVa?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - Post-recording: produce, release on major podcasting platforms, and promote via newsletter and LinkedIn
